falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Challenge whether existing repo docs and helpers are already sufficient without a dedicated manifest + skill split.
falsificationQueries: Inspect AGENTS.md for complete fresh-context bootstrap coverage
Inspect codex for existing V3 cohort helper
Inspect lab/codex surfaces for missing cohort-level launch/reset/status primitives
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The falsifier found strong counterevidence to any absolute claim that a manifest + skill is the only viable path: AGENTS.md already bootstraps a fresh agent, and reseedV3Experiments is a partial code-level cohort helper. But the same evidence also shows drift, duplication, and stale semantics. The claim survives in softened form: manifest + skill is the highest-value next layer, not the only theoretically possible approach.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Challenge whether a first-class iteration snapshot artifact is really necessary, given current codex/lab observability.
falsificationQueries: Check whether one existing API already provides a full cohort forensic snapshot
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Current surfaces already expose enough information to reconstruct a failed pass, but only by composing multiple bounded views. No first-class iteration artifact exists. This weakens the claim that snapshotting is the only missing observability feature, but still supports it as a top priority.
